# pip compile Exclude Newer

Tests for `--exclude-newer` functionality in `uv pip compile`.

```toml
# mdtest

[environment]
python-version = "3.12"
required-features = "pypi"
```

## Basic exclude-newer

### Resolve at a specific time

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_exclude_newer -->

Resolving with `--exclude-newer` limits packages to those available before the specified time.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
tqdm
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --exclude-newer 2022-04-04T12:00:00Z
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --exclude-newer 2022-04-04T12:00:00Z
tqdm==4.64.0
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

### Resolve with date only

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_exclude_newer -->

Using a date (without time) includes packages released on that day.

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --exclude-newer 2022-04-04
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --exclude-newer 2022-04-04
tqdm==4.64.0
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

## Invalid datetime

### Invalid date format

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_exclude_newer -->

An invalid datetime format produces an error.

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --exclude-newer 2022-04-04+02:00
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: invalid value '2022-04-04+02:00' for '--exclude-newer <EXCLUDE_NEWER>': `2022-04-04+02:00` could not be parsed as a valid date: parsed value '2022-04-04', but unparsed input "+02:00" remains (expected no unparsed input)

For more information, try '--help'.
```

### Invalid hour in timestamp

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_exclude_newer -->

An invalid hour in the timestamp produces an error.

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --exclude-newer 2022-04-04T26:00:00+00
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: invalid value '2022-04-04T26:00:00+00' for '--exclude-newer <EXCLUDE_NEWER>': `2022-04-04T26:00:00+00` could not be parsed as a valid date: failed to parse hour in time "26:00:00+00": hour is not valid: parameter 'hour' with value 26 is not in the required range of 0..=23

For more information, try '--help'.
```

## Per-package exclude-newer

### Global exclude-newer with package override

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_exclude_newer_package -->

A global `--exclude-newer` can be overridden for specific packages with `--exclude-newer-package`.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
tqdm
requests
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --exclude-newer 2022-04-04T12:00:00Z
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --exclude-newer 2022-04-04T12:00:00Z
certifi==2021.10.8
    # via requests
charset-normalizer==2.0.12
    # via requests
idna==3.3
    # via requests
requests==2.27.1
    # via -r requirements.in
tqdm==4.64.0
    # via -r requirements.in
urllib3==1.26.9
    # via requests

----- stderr -----
Resolved 6 packages in [TIME]
```

### Override package to use newer version

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_exclude_newer_package -->

Allow `tqdm` to use a newer version while keeping `requests` pinned with the global exclude-newer.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
tqdm
requests
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --exclude-newer 2022-04-04T12:00:00Z --exclude-newer-package tqdm=2022-09-04T00:00:00Z
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --exclude-newer 2022-04-04T12:00:00Z --exclude-newer-package tqdm=2022-09-04T00:00:00Z
certifi==2021.10.8
    # via requests
charset-normalizer==2.0.12
    # via requests
idna==3.3
    # via requests
requests==2.27.1
    # via -r requirements.in
tqdm==4.64.1
    # via -r requirements.in
urllib3==1.26.9
    # via requests

----- stderr -----
Resolved 6 packages in [TIME]
```
